title: Convert ChatKind/ChatMemberRole/OwnerPresence Unknown to Unknown(String)
description: Three enums with #[serde(other)] Unknown (unit variant) appear in outbound serialized fields. Fix by converting each to Unknown(String) with manual serde, matching the PushUrgency/BodyType pattern already in the file. Outbound paths: ChatKind in ChatQueryInput.filter_kind (chat.rs:38) and ChatPushConfig.kinds (misc.rs:194); ChatMemberRole in AddMemberInput.role (chat.rs:278) and UpdateMemberRoleInput.role (chat.rs:304, non-optional); OwnerPresence in PresenceStatusPatch.presence (misc.rs:101).
